name: Quick and Tasty Chicken Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Simmer the first seven ingredients together for about 10 minutes.
2. Make a paste by mixing arrowroot with 1 tablespoon water.
3. Add the paste to the soup and cook until clear and smooth (this takes just a few seconds).
Food Exchange per serving: 2 3/4 Lean Meat Exchanges
CAL: 185 THAT'S ALL!!
Source: Recipes for Diabetics by Billie Little
(2 almost 2 1/2 years ago, I was diagnosed as diabetic, this was one of the first several books I purchased. Then I found an early version at a thrift store. Both are so different.)
